name: relixq-oss
description: Relix-Q OSS — JavaScript/TypeScript workspace root. Hosts the OSS npm packages (packages/npm/*) and the canonical OSS web app (apps/web).
author: Yasvanth Udayakumar

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @relix-q/web-client && npm run build --workspace @relix-q/web-components
